description_long: This object is a bunch of dark, nearly black grapes, each grape appearing plump and round with a glossy, reflective skin. The grapes are tightly clustered together, forming a conical bunch that tapers toward the bottom. A slender, green stem extends from the top, visibly connecting the grapes and providing a natural attachment point. The surface of each grape is smooth and shiny, with subtle highlights indicating a fresh, juicy texture. The bunch is compact, with minimal gaps between the individual grapes, giving it a dense and robust appearance. The overall coloration is a deep purple-black, with occasional hints of lighter green on the stem.
description: A tightly packed bunch of glossy, dark purple-black grapes with a green stem, featuring smooth, shiny skins and a conical shape.
description_view_0: This view shows the bunch from a slightly angled side, highlighting the dense clustering and the green stem emerging from the top.
description_view_1: This view presents the grapes from a more direct front, emphasizing the rounded, glossy surfaces and the compact arrangement.
description_view_2: This view displays the bunch from another side, revealing the conical taper and the way the stem branches out to connect the grapes.
description_view_3: This view shows the grapes from a rear angle, focusing on the lower part of the bunch and the uniformity of the grape arrangement.
